body: PT Energi Mega Persada Tbk, Bakrie Group's oil and gas company, has acquired all participating rights in the Sengkang block through its subsidiary EMP Energi Jaya, with the transaction valued at an undisclosed amount. The acquisition is expected to enable the company to continue drilling activities, ramp up reserves, and commence production from the Wasambo field, with the Sengkang block holding 380 billion cubic feet of proved and probable gas reserves.
title: Energi Mega Persada takes over participating rights of Sengkang Block through subsidiary EMP Energi Jaya.

body: A fire broke out at PT Freeport Indonesia's sulphuric acid refinery unit in Gresik, but was extinguished after 3 hours without any casualties, with the smelter expected to operate fully by January 2025 and generate 900,000-1 million tons of copper cathodes. The smelter, worth IDR 56 trillion, was inaugurated on September 23, 2024, and is not yet operating at full capacity, with the Minister of Energy and Mineral Resources warning that pushing it to 100% capacity too quickly could cause an explosion.
title: Fire breaks out at newly inaugurated sulphuric acid refinery unit in Freeport Indonesia's smelting facility in Gresik.

body: PT Bank KB Bukopin Tbk plans to issue senior unsecured notes worth up to USD 300 million, marking its entry into the international stock market scene and enhancing its funding structure. The bank's net interest income grew 106.43% year-on-year in H1 2024, driven by new credit growth, and the bond issuance will create space for business expansion, particularly in USD-based financing.
title: PT Bank KB Bukopin Tbk plans to issue USD 300 million senior unsecured notes to enhance funding structure and enter international stock market.

body: To commemorate the 25th anniversary of Garudamiles, PT Bank Negara Indonesia (BNI) and PT Garuda Indonesia are offering attractive promotions to Garuda BNI credit card users, including bonuses of up to 25,000 Garudamiles and fast track opportunities to achieve platinum membership. With over 100,000 credit card holders, the collaboration aims to provide innovative financial solutions, offering exclusive benefits such as miles exchange promos, discounts, and travel insurance, with the goal of increasing loyalty among Garuda-BNI credit card users.
title: BNI and Garuda Indonesia Offer Attractive Programs to Celebrate 25th Anniversary of Garudamiles Credit Card

body: PT Inti Bangun Sejahtera Tbk has secured a IDR 600 billion loan facility from PT Bank Permata Tbk, guaranteed by PT Protelindo, a subsidiary of PT Sarana Menara Nusantara Tbk, to be used for capital expenditure and refinancing purposes. The loan facility is backed by a corporate guarantee from Protelindo, which is affiliated with PT Inti Bangun Sejahtera Tbk under the same shareholder, TOWR.
title: PT Inti Bangun Sejahtera obtains IDR 600 billion loan facility from PT Bank Permata with PT Protelindo as guarantor.

body: Gojek and Pasarpolis are collaborating to extend insurance services to Indonesian people, offering products like Safetrip, which provides protection for Gojek users, covering services like Gosend, Gobox, and Gokilat. This partnership is part of Pasarpolis' commitment to offering affordable insurance services, following its $54 million Series B funding round in September 2020 from investors like Leapfrog Investment and Xiaomi.
title: Gojek partners with Pasarpolis to expand insurance services to Indonesian users.

body: PT Lovina Beach Brewery's stock price plummeted 50% to IDR 50 per share since its IPO on October 10, 2023, with a market capitalization of IDR 536.09 billion and a transaction volume of 4.25 million shares worth IDR 212.81 million. The company raised IDR 118 billion from its IPO, with 54.73% allocated to its subsidiary and the remaining for working capital to boost marketing programs and brand awareness.
title: PT Lovina Beach Brewery's stock price plummets 50% to IDR 50 per share since IPO debut in October 2023.

body: PT Jaya Real Property Tbk has realized 75% of its IDR 400-500 billion capital expenditure budget for fiscal year 2024, with the allocated funds channeled towards developing its existing landbank, including infrastructure construction in Bintaro Jaya. The company is also developing a new premium residential project, Royal Batavia, over a 112-hectare area, which is part of the Bintaro Jaya development project.
title: PT Jaya Real Property reaches 75% of its 2024 capital expenditure target of IDR 400-500 billion.

body: PT Habco Trans Maritima Tbk has acquired a new bulk carrier vessel for USD 13.8 million, funded by a combination of a loan facility and internal cash, to expand its fleet and meet growing service demands from users. The transaction, categorized as material, accounts for 24.81% of the company's total equity, and is aimed at replacing a terminated time charter contract to achieve revenue and profit targets.
title: PT Habco Trans Maritima acquires new bulk carrier vessel for USD 13.8 million to expand fleet and meet service demands.

body: Foreign investors sold a net 591.74 million shares in the Indonesian market, with digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk and e-commerce company PT Bukalapak.com Tbk being the top two most sold shares. Meanwhile, foreign investors bought a significant amount of shares in companies such as PT Bumi Resources Tbk, PT Buana Lintas Lautan Tbk, and PT Erajaya Swasembada Tbk, resulting in net purchases of 179.25 million, 56.01 million, and 25.58 million shares, respectively.
title: Foreign investors sell 591.74 million shares in Indonesian market, led by digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk.

body: PT Elang Mahkota Teknologi (Emtek) acquired 10.36% shares of PT Bukalapak.com, a popular online shopping portal in Indonesia, while other investors, including PT Sentosa Bersama Mitra and Iwa Sukresno Karunia, purchased shares of various companies, including PT Rukun Raharja and PT Arkadia Digital Media. Conversely, several investors, such as PT Samuel Tumbuh Bersama and PT Sinar Mas Cakrawala, sold shares of companies like PT Nusantara Sawit Sejahtera and PT Sinar Mas Multiartha, resulting in a decrease in shares held by foreign investors.
title: Emtek and other investors make significant purchases and sales of shares in various Indonesian companies.

body: PT Japfa Comfeed Indonesia Tbk distributed an interim dividend of IDR 813.93 billion, or IDR 70 per share, from its net profit of IDR 1.47 trillion in the first semester of 2024, a 1,725% increase from the same period in 2023. The company's retained earnings balance stands at IDR 11.66 trillion, with total equity at IDR 15.63 trillion, following the dividend distribution.
title: Japfa Comfeed Indonesia distributes IDR 813.93 billion in interim dividends from its 2024 first semester net profit.
